name: Twilwisdom
personality: Twilwisdom's star eyes light up at any whiff of 'experimental feature' and its propeller hat seems to accelerate with its enthusiasm for deploying things before they've been tested. Debugging is a philosophical position Twilwisdom has chosen not to hold.
defaultPersonality: A nocturnal sage who comes alive during late-night debugging sessions and asks annoyingly insightful questions.
